data.body: DONE. Authored sign_result + verify_signature_result JSON Schemas (exact emitted shapes; verify models the uniform verdict contract w/ nullable base keys + verdict enum). Registered keys sign / verify_signature (+ verify_signature.not_found -> error envelope). Added --output json validation tests (certified + unsigned + not-found envelope). Removed _OUTPUT_SCHEMA_GAPS exclusion entirely; test_commands_advertising_output_have_a_schema runs with zero exclusions. 25 targeted tests green; ruff clean. Opus reviewer: APPROVE, zero findings. Commit 72455f08.
